description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has four jobs: pylama, mypy, tests, and finish. The pylama and mypy jobs run on ubuntu-latest, set up Python 3.10, cache the virtual environment, install poetry, and run pylama or mypy. The tests job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions from 3.9 to 3.13, sets up Python, caches the virtual environment, installs poetry, and runs pytest and coveralls. The finish job depends on the tests job and uses the coverallsapp/github-action to finalize the Coveralls report.
